summary: Iteration 2 (JWT auth + incident workflow + Claude chat + sources CRUD + SLA banner) — full e2e PASS. Backend: 20/20 pytest tests pass (incl. real Claude Sonnet 4.5 triage ~22s and real chat reply ~25s). Frontend: every flow validated headlessly — login→dashboard→seed→age-alerts→SLA banner→select-all→run triage→incident detail→pickup→add collaborator→post update→chat (AI replies, history persists across reload)→resolve (chat input becomes disabled)→sources add/toggle/delete→logout.

issues: Pre-existing Recharts width(-1)/height(-1) console warnings on initial mount; cosmetic only.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~760 lines — exceeds 700-line guideline. Split into modules: routes/auth.py, routes/incidents.py, routes/chat.py, routes/sources.py, services/triage.py, models.py.
JWT_SECRET in backend/.env should be considered sensitive; default fallback 'dev-secret' in code is fine but flag for prod hardening (rotate per env, never commit).
No password complexity / brute-force lockout / rate limit on /api/auth/login — acceptable for demo but call out before any prod use.
/api/auth/users returns full user list to ANY authenticated user (incl. viewer). Tighten to admin/on-call if real RBAC is needed.
/api/sources POST/PATCH/DELETE has no role check — viewer can mutate sources. Consider gating to admin.
POST /api/incidents/{id}/collaborators silently $addToSet but always pushes an 'Added X as collaborator' update even if already a collaborator (creates duplicate noise activity entries).
incident pickup overwrites assignee unconditionally — no check for existing assignee. Consider 409 if already assigned to someone else.
Chat /api/incidents/{id}/chat persists user message even when LLM call fails (writes fallback assistant reply); behavior is fine but document it.
seed_data_creation: POST /api/seed re-seeds 10 deterministic alerts (idempotent). POST /api/demo/age-alerts ages 3 alerts to 6 days old to trigger SLA banner.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Regression suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers auth (login/me/users/protection), sources CRUD, full incident lifecycle (triage→pickup→collab→update→resolve+linked alerts), scope=mine vs scope=others, chat round-trip with Claude Sonnet 4.5 + 400 after resolve, and unattended SLA via age-alerts. Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v (~70s incl. 2 real Claude calls). Frontend testids: login-email, login-password, login-submit, demo-user-{handle}, seed-btn, age-alerts-btn, simulate-btn, run-triage-btn, alert-select-all, alert-row-{id}, triage-result-panel, unattended-banner, incidents-tab-{mine|others|all}, incident-row-{id}, pickup-btn, add-collab-btn, add-collab-{handle}, update-input, post-update-btn, resolve-incident-btn, incident-chat, chat-input, chat-send, add-source-btn, src-submit, source-row-{id}, toggle-source-{id}, delete-source-{id}, user-card, logout-btn.
